title: Smoldering Multiple Myeloma: From Clinical to Immunogenomic Risk Stratification and Therapeutic Implications of Early Intervention.
publicationName: American Society of Clinical Oncology educational book. American Society of Clinical Oncology. Annual Meeting
journalName: American Society of Clinical Oncology educational book. American Society of Clinical Oncology. Annual Meeting
snippet: Smoldering multiple myeloma (SMM) is an asymptomatic precursor state that precedes the development of symptomatic active MM. Newer immunogenomic data highlight the monoclonal gammopathy of undetermined significance-SMM-MM spectrum as a continuous genomic gradient rather than a series of discrete clinical categories.
